comments.body: @cevich https://github.com/containers/automation/commit/1182675918e60fabeff140b2887fefd59b2fe6ca suggests that Renovate was not supposed to file a rollback PR for a digest dependency. (And also, it didn’t update `vendor`, which it usually does.)

> (And also, it didn’t update `vendor`, which it usually does.)

That’s probably because this version is required by c/common, so this PR would need to downgrade that as well. IOW we can’t downgrade this.
In case anybody comes across this PR: I reverted a change I made to the rollbackPR setting which originally caused this PR to be opened.
